title: LR-98
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: The merciful love of the Lord fills the earth; by the word of the Lord the heavens were made, Alleluia.

title: Psalm 23: 1-3, 3-4, 5, 6
author: Sarah Hart
snippet: The Lord is my shepherd; there is nothing I shall want.

title: John 10:14
author: Joshua Blakesley
snippet: I am the good shepherd, says the Lord; I know my sheep, and mine know me.

title: Jesus, Meek and Humble
author: Ben Walther/Sarah Hart
snippet: Jesus, meek and humble, heaven’s gift to earth, Word from Word among us, spoken from the first. Song of our salvation, rising from the fall. Jesus, meek and humble, heaven’s hope for all.

title: LR-99
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: The Good Shepherd has risen, Who laid down his life for his sheep and willingly died for his flock, alleluia.

title: Bread for the World
author: Bernadette Farrell
snippet: Bread for the world: a world of hunger. Wine for all peoples: people who thirst. May we who eat be bread for others. May we who drink pour out our love.

title: Nothing Shall I Want
author: Suno xJim Ngo
snippet: The Lord is my shepherd... There is nothing shall I want..

title: I Will Follow
author: Chris Tomlin
snippet: Where You go, I'll go; Where You stay, I'll stay; When You move, I'll move. I will follow.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
